loop1.title: Events KPI Strip
loop1.note: Showing event counts and worst deviations for members with live data (UPS-01 to UPS-05); supply feeders (Solar/Transformer) are dark and omitted.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing panel-aggregate narrative; per-member stats are bound to available columns (voltage_avg, current_avg, etc.) but some members (UPS-06, UPS-07) are dark and will render as honest blanks.

loop1.title: Event Timeline at {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-member event counts and voltage/current stats; supply-side members (Solar Incomers, Transformers) are dark (no data) and honest-blank their slots.

loop1.title: Current Distribution at {period}
loop1.note: Showing current distribution for 6 active feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark (no live data) and honest-blanked.

loop1.title: Other Panels Event at {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-panel event counts and voltage/current metrics for live feeders; supply-side members (Solar/Transformer) are dark and honest-blanked.
